name: Jungle Pocket || The Strongest Of The New Era
description:
"I'll shut everyone up, and prove to all of Japan and the world that I am the strongest!"

POKKE! Okay, I know it, you know it, your grandma probably knows it, but Beginning Of The New Era movie was the best piece of Umamusume content to come out of the franchise, bar none! Cygames just said 'Let's make horse girls hype' and the chads did it spectacularly.

The movie was so good, the animations were god-like and every character in that movie was amazing. It really captured the year of 2001 perfectly. While I could yap about it for hours, I'm not gonna spoil anything, go watch the movie if you haven't, you numbskulls!

What I will say tho is that Jungle Pocket is a big W character! I really like the competitive tomboy energy she has... Wait.

I made a tomboy bot. HELL YEAH!

Artist: I got nothing funny to add, damn

I really wanted to make Pokke so I rushed her a bit, next bot in a few days.

Next bot: Her.

Looney Tunes ahh average Pokke reaction to anything:
creator: TehManika
